synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0470 Important: Oracle Linux 9 podman security update
description:
[5.6.0-11.0.1]
- Add devices on container startup, not on creation
- overlay: Put should ignore ENINVAL for Unmount [Orabug: 36234694]
- Drop nmap-ncat requirement and skip ignore-socket test case [Orabug: 34117404]

[6:5.6.0-11]
- update to the latest content of https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/v5.6-rhel
  (https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/0a20b84)
- fixes "CVE-2025-47913 podman: golang.org/x/crypto/ssh/agent: SSH client panic due to unexpected SSH_AGENT_SUCCESS [rhel-9.7.z]"
- Resolves: RHEL-134793

[6:5.6.0-10]
- update to the latest content of https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/v5.6-rhel
  (https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/a58af02)
- fixes "[podman 5.6][runc 1.3.3] podman update can not update the io related options with runc"
- Resolves: RHEL-81042
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0470

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0470.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
podman-5.6.0-11.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
podman-docker-5.6.0-11.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
podman-plugins-5.6.0-11.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
podman-remote-5.6.0-11.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
podman-tests-5.6.0-11.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
podman-5.6.0-11.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
podman-docker-5.6.0-11.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
podman-plugins-5.6.0-11.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
podman-remote-5.6.0-11.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
podman-tests-5.6.0-11.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/podman-5.6.0-11.0.1.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-47913




Description of changes:

[5.6.0-11.0.1]
- Add devices on container startup, not on creation
- overlay: Put should ignore ENINVAL for Unmount [Orabug: 36234694]
- Drop nmap-ncat requirement and skip ignore-socket test case [Orabug: 34117404]

[6:5.6.0-11]
- update to the latest content of https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/v5.6-rhel
  (https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/0a20b84)
- fixes "CVE-2025-47913 podman: golang.org/x/crypto/ssh/agent: SSH client panic due to unexpected SSH_AGENT_SUCCESS [rhel-9.7.z]"
- Resolves: RHEL-134793

[6:5.6.0-10]
- update to the latest content of https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/v5.6-rhel
  (https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/a58af02)
- fixes "[podman 5.6][runc 1.3.3] podman update can not update the io related options with runc"
- Resolves: RHEL-81042
